---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new backend capability, workflow improvement, or showcase example
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem is not handled well today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the capability you want to add.

## Example Input

Share a minimal paper snippet, Markdown table, patent excerpt, or task description.

## Desired Output

What artifact should the repo generate?

## Why This Matters

Explain whether this helps onboarding, rendering quality, verification, reproducibility, or contributor adoption.
